description: Whether or not you make it to the slopes this year, this timepiece from aspen captures the spirit and beauty of a mountain side covered in pristine snow. Luxury watchmakers Aspen have used the most precise technology and the most exquisite materials to create stylish watches perfect for the sophisticated you. Case diameter: 22 mm Case thickness: 6 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Warranty: Two Years Stainless steel rectangular case with crystal embellishments Stainless steel strap with a butterfly clasp Silver dial with metallic hands One chronograph time display Screw to reset time Aspen branding on the dial Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering or in light rain
